template.name: Node
template.parameter: const nodeid_t id, const weight_t weight, const topology_t can_hear, broadcast chan &sendWM, nodeid_t &aux_node, slot_t &aux_slot, used_slot_t &first[nodeid_t], used_slot_t &second[nodeid_t], slot_t &slot_no[nodeid_t], int &col_count, power_t &power

transition.label: curr==slot_no[id] && first[id]==zero_vec && id!=0
counter=-1, detected=-1, slot_no[id]=-1, aux_vec=zero_vec, first[id]=zero_vec, sent_info=0
sendWM!
detected=-1, sent_info=1
Broadcast information about collisions if any
can_hear[id][aux_node]
sendWM?
detected=(detected<0)?curr:detected, rec_vec=zero_vec, col_count++
detected two messages in one slot: record the collision
t==2 && (col==slot_no[id] || (rec_vec[slot_no[id]] && !sent_info))
counter=0, curr=(curr+1)%frame, col=-1, detected=-1, slot_no[id]=-1, first[id]=zero_vec, sent_info=0, rec_vec=zero_vec, t=0, power[id]=LISTEN
Reported colision on our slot
can_hear[id][aux_node]==1
sendWM?
col=aux_slot, first[id][curr]=1, rec_vec=sent_info? zero_vec : first[aux_node], power[id]=RECV
id==0
curr=0, power[id]=SEND
Gateway uses slot #0 and initiates the communication.
aux_vec==max_vec || aux_vec==zero_vec
counter=-1, aux_vec=zero_vec, first[id]=zero_vec, second[id]=zero_vec, detected=-1
All slots taken, reset the neighbour information.
